mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND user_pw = #{user_pw}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account ( user_id, user_pw, user_name, user_email, user_phone, user_type, company_name, company_email, manager_name, created_at ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{user_pw}, #{user_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user_type}, #{company_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manager_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM user_account WHERE user_name = #{user_name} AND user_email = #{user_email}
SELECT user_id, user_name, user_email, user_phone, user_type, created_at, company_name, company_email, manager_name FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET user_name = #{user_name}, user_email = #{user_email}, user_phone = #{user_phone}, company_name = #{company_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company_email = #{company_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manager_name = #{manager_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
